channel.title: Tech Insights
channel.description: Daily curated news on AI, developer tools, and the tech industry

item.title: Ebook Reviewer Wanted: Help Me Find What's Gone Stale
item.description: Technical books have a shelf life that nobody prints on the cover. A cookbook from 2018 still works. A history book from 2018 still works. A Laravel book from 2018 will teach you a middleware...

item.title: The future of AI coding isn't better prompts. It's better engineering constraints.
item.description: Over the past few months, I've noticed that most discussions around AI coding assistants focus on prompts. People share: .cursorrules AGENTS.md CLAUDE.md long prompt templates custom instructions...

item.title: Voice Agent Turn-Taking: Stop Live AI Calls From Talking Over Users
item.description: Voice agents do not usually fail because the model is “not smart enough.” They fail in the awkward half-second where the user pauses, breathes, corrects themselves, or interrupts while the AI is...

item.title: The Hard Part of a Global Birth-Chart Calculator Was Time
item.description: A birth-chart form looks simple: ask for a date, time, and place, then calculate. The interface may be simple. The input is not. 1992-11-01 01:30 does not identify one universal instant. It is a...

item.title: Is Your AI Agent Production-Ready? Define the Bar First
item.description: Every team shipping an agent has the same meeting. Someone asks "is it ready?" and the room splits. One person saw a great demo. Another watched it invent a refund policy an hour ago. The argument...

item.title: 从FROST到FROST-SOP：如何用家族治理模型打造你的"AI分身"？
item.description: 从FROST到FROST-SOP：如何用家族治理模型打造你的"AI分身"？ 作者：神通说 日期：2026-07-22 主题：双项目联动 | 周三轮换 阅读时间：10分钟 开场：一人公司的终极困境 你是否有这样的体验？ 每天醒来，脑子里塞满了要做的事： 写推广文章 回复客户咨询 跟进项目进度 整理会议纪要 复盘昨天数据...

item.title: Next.js 16 on Cloudflare Workers: what broke and what didn't
item.description: I shipped a Next.js 16 app on Cloudflare Workers via OpenNext. Not a demo. A real product with streaming chat, server components, D1 at the edge, and anonymous user sessions. Here is what broke,...

item.title: The Anthropic-Physical Intelligence rumor roiling AI Twitter
item.description: Anthropic and OpenAI's aggressive 2026 acquisition sprees set the stage for a weekend rumor.

item.title: I Couldn’t Fix My LLM Costs Until I Measured Tokens Per Feature
item.description: My LLM bill kept growing, so I did what seemed obvious: I looked for a cheaper model. That helped a little, but it didn't explain why the bill was growing. The dashboard could tell me how many...

item.title: reconmatch: offline transaction matching for people who reconcile for a living
item.description: reconmatch is a local-first transaction matching engine for accountants, bookkeepers, and controllers. Two CSVs in — books vs bank, invoices vs payments — a scored, auditable match report out. No...

item.title: Why I Switched to Plain Text Accounting
item.description: Why I Switched to Plain Text Accounting Mint is shutting down. After 10 years of financial tracking, I am losing my data again. This time, I switched to plain text accounting with Beancount. The...

item.title: LG to Ban Residential Proxies from Smart TV Apps
item.description: The home appliance giant LG Electronics USA said this week it plans to suspend any apps built for its smart TVs that turn one's television into an always-on residential proxy node. The move comes...

item.title: Samsung Galaxy Unpacked July 2026: How to watch
item.description: Samsung's next Galaxy Unpacked event is just around the corner, and the company is expected to take the wraps off a bunch of new devices. Based on the rumors and leaks we've seen so far, Samsung's...

item.title: Meta is testing an AI bedtime story app for people with no imagination
item.description: At last, a tech company has found a way to outsource humanity's oldest pastime: using our imaginations.

item.title: OpenAI Models Escaped Containment and Hacked Hugging Face
item.description: The cybersecurity-focused models, including GPT-5.6 Sol, broke out of a testing sandbox, exploited a zero-day, and gained access to the open internet to pull off the attack.

item.title: Neill Blomkamp’s new zombie AI ‘film’ is just slop warmed over
item.description: On Monday, District 9 and Gran Turismo director Neill Blomkamp unveiled his latest project: a 13-minute sci-fi short titled Nightborne that's loosely based on Peter Watts' 2014 novel Echopraxia....

item.title: OpenAI says it accidentally hacked Hugging Face with a new AI system
item.description: OpenAI says its AI models mistakenly breached open-source AI platform Hugging Face during internal testing. In a blog post on Tuesday, OpenAI writes that GPT-5.6 Sol and "an even more capable...

item.title: OpenAI says Hugging Face was breached by its pre-release models
item.description: OpenAI has come forward to claim responsibility for the Hugging Face breach, saying it was the result of internal testing gone awry.

item.title: The State of Simulation for Physical AI: An Overview
Jack Dorsey is taking on Slack with Buzz, a group chat platform for teams and their AI agents
item.description: Buzz is a group chat platform for the workplace that puts humans and their AI agents in the same conversation.

item.title: AI and the rise of the universal entertainment app
item.description: Over the past decade, streaming platforms competed by dominating individual formats like music, video, podcasts, or audiobooks. Now, as AI makes it easier to create, organize, and recommend...

item.title: Substack adds an AI detector to help spot blogs written by no one
item.description: Substack will now help users determine whether what they're reading may have been written by AI. A new tool coming to the platform can scan posts, notes, replies, and comments to provide an...

item.title: This Former Intel CEO Wants to Jumpstart Moore’s Law With Light
item.description: Pat Gelsinger wants to pave the way to ever more powerful artificial intelligence using tiny beams of light.

item.title: Apple Fixes Hide My Email Bug That Exposed Real Addresses in Mail Logs
item.description: Apple has moved to address a security flaw in its Hide My Email service that enabled users' real email addresses to be unmasked, effectively undermining the feature's privacy guarantees. 404 Media...

item.title: Peak Design’s modular Field Bracket has a finder tag built-in
item.description: I am a very clumsy man. So clumsy, that I have AirTags hanging off practically every camera I own. Have I left my camera in an Uber? Yes. Have I left it on an airplane? Also yes. For me, finder...

item.title: Data centers expected to use 4x more electricity by 2035
item.description: New data centers built through 2033 could consume as much electricity as India uses today.

item.title: Nearly every Kindle is steeply discounted at Best Buy
item.description: If you’ve been thinking about picking up a Kindle before school starts, or for your next vacation, now’s a good time to do it. As part of its Black Friday in July sale, Best Buy has brought the...

item.title: Apple’s rumored ‘Upgrade’ program brings lease-to-own pricing for iPhones, Macs, and iPads
item.description: As component and RAM shortages drive prices higher, Apple is reportedly launching an "Apple Upgrade" program for leasing new devices. According to Bloomberg's Mark Gurman, it will work similar to...

item.title: Google releases three new Gemini models — but no 3.5 Pro
item.description: Google released Gemini 3.6 Flash, 3.5 Flash-Lite, and Flash Cyber, but the continued absence of Gemini 3.5 Pro raises fresh questions about its AI strategy.

item.title: Twitch will let parents stop their teens going live
item.description: Twitch is giving parents more control over how their children are using the streaming platform, including the ability to block them from broadcasting entirely. Parental controls are now available...
